creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like devel/llvm36 found libtinfo from devel/ncurses when it was looking for ncurses support.  That's bug in the port since I think the system ncurses should be fine.

Since you last built devel/llvm36, devel/ncurses has changed major revisions to 6 so the .5 versions of libraries are gone.  Due to the bug above, there's no dependency on devel/ncurses so the llvm version wasn't bumped.  I'd suggest rebuilding devel/llvm36 manually.
